params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Creates an outbound phone call. The call will be initiated from the specified Bandwidth number to the destination number. The answerUrl will receive a webhook when the call is answered, and your application should respond with BXML to control the call flow.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

items.docs: Retrieves the current state and metadata for a specific call identified by its call ID.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

items.docs: Modifies an in-progress call by redirecting it to a new BXML document URL or by completing the call. This enables advanced call control scenarios such as transferring, bridging, or terminating calls programmatically.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all recordings associated with a specific call. Each recording includes metadata such as duration, file format, and media URL for downloading the audio file.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

params.name: recordingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recording

items.docs: Retrieves metadata for a specific recording associated with a call.

params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

params.name: recordingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recording

items.docs: Permanently deletes a specific call recording and its associated media file.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

params.name: recordingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recording

items.docs: Downloads the audio file for a specific call recording. Returns the binary audio content in the format specified during recording.

params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

params.name: recordingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recording

items.docs: Retrieves the transcription result for a specific call recording.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call

params.name: recordingId
params.description: The unique identifier for the recording

items.docs: Initiates a transcription job for a specific call recording. The transcription result will be delivered via a webhook callback to the URL specified in the request or the application's default callback URL.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: from
params.description: Filter recordings created on or after this date

params.name: to
params.description: Filter recordings created on or before this date

params.name: minStartTime
params.description: Minimum start time for filtering recordings

params.name: maxStartTime
params.description: Maximum start time for filtering recordings

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all recordings across all calls for the account. Supports filtering by date range and pagination.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: name
params.description: Filter conferences by name

params.name: minCreatedTime
params.description: Minimum creation time for filtering

params.name: maxCreatedTime
params.description: Maximum creation time for filtering

items.docs: Retrieves a list of conferences associated with the account, including active and completed conferences.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: conferenceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conference

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific conference including its current state and list of members.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: conferenceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conference

items.docs: Modifies an active conference. Can be used to mute all members, set the conference status to completed (ending the conference), or redirect the conference to a new callback URL.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: conferenceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conference

params.name: memberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the conference member

items.docs: Modifies a specific member of an active conference. Supports muting, unmuting, holding, and removing individual members.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: conferenceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the conference

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all recordings associated with a specific conference.
